reaction.experimentalDisclaimer: This result was produced by a heuristic engine (valence + electronegativity estimate), not the curated rule DB. It may not match real-world outcomes.
reaction.error.rdkitNotReady: The chemistry engine is still loading.
reaction.error.rdkitInitFailed: Chemistry engine failed to initialize. Reload the page if this persists.
reaction.error.noMatchingRule: No rule matches the given reactants and conditions.
reaction.error.conditionOutOfRange: Conditions fall outside the applicable rule ranges.
reaction.error.invalidReactant: One or more reactants are invalid for this reaction.
reaction.error.embedFailed: Failed to generate 3D coordinates for the products.
app.webgl2Unsupported.title: WebGL2 not supported
app.webgl2Unsupported.reason: Your browser or device does not support WebGL2, required for the 3D molecular viewport.
app.webgl2Unsupported.suggestion: Update your browser to the latest version, or enable hardware acceleration / WebGL2 in browser settings.
app.panelError.title: The {{slot}} panel encountered an error

parse.formulaUnsupported: No SMILES mapping for this formula. Try SMILES input or compound search.

embed.timeout: 3D structure generation timed out. Try again or use simpler input.
embed.ionHandling: Cannot handle this ion / radical for 3D embedding.

error.duplicate: An identical molecule already exists in the workspace.
error.rdkitNotReady: Chemistry engine is not ready. Reload the page if this persists.

export.canvasNotReady: Viewport is not ready. Try again.
export.sdfFailed: Failed to serialize SDF for molecule {{moleculeId}}.
export.fileTooLarge: Export size {{sizeMb}} MB exceeds limit {{limitMb}} MB.

import.fileTooLarge: File size {{sizeMb}} MB exceeds limit {{limitMb}} MB.
import.noMolecules: No molecules found in the file.
